check.action:
List the bundle directory. Expected contents: - design-YYYY-MM-DD-.md (mandatory) - structure-YYYY-MM-DD-.md (mandatory if S-phase ran) - plan-YYYY-MM-DD-.md (or plan-N.md for multi-plan) - research-YYYY-MM-DD-.md (optional per Lock 5) - verification-YYYY-MM-DD-.md (may not yet exist)
Read design.md frontmatter. Extract: - parent → {{ticket_alias}} (strip [[ ]]) - aliases[0] → {{design_alias}}
Derive {{ticket_slug}} from {{ticket_alias}}.
Resolve the ticket via `thoughts metadata` + alias lookup. Read the ticket frontmatter to populate {{primary_tag}}, {{ticket_topic}}.

substep.title: Read CONTEXT.md
substep.action: Read CONTEXT.md or CONTEXT-MAP.md at repo root if it exists. Store the glossary terms in session as {{glossary}}. If neither file exists, set {{glossary}} = none (lazy-create will fire later if a term is resolved during Q↔R).
